tldr: 🚨 DeepSeek's legacy chat/reasoner endpoints retire TODAY at 15:59 UTC — migrate to V4. OpenAI launches Presence, a full enterprise agent deployment platform with voice, chat, simulation and guardrails. Kimi K3 (2.8T params, the largest open-source model ever) drops full weights July 27 — trails only Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol. Anthropic publishes alignment auditing agents (three autonomous auditors deployed on Claude Opus 4) and ships advanced tool use features. Microsoft Research's Arbor research agent beats Codex and Claude Code on six research tasks. Policy: White House releases AI Action Plan, startup founders push back on Chinese open-weight cutoff. Audio.cpp Release 0.4 brings Higgs Audio v3 TTS and Fish Audio S2 Pro to C++/GGML. Qwen-VLA unifies vision-language-action across robots and environments.

articles.title: ⚠️ deepseek-chat & deepseek-reasoner endpoints retire TODAY — July 24, 15:59 UTC
articles.summary: Legacy endpoints fully shut down. Route to deepseek-v4-flash or deepseek-v4-pro. All integrations must be updated now.

articles.title: OpenAI launches Presence — enterprise agent deployment platform
articles.summary: Battle-tested enterprise product for deploying AI agents across customer and internal workflows. Voice, chat, simulations, guardrails, escalation rules.

articles.title: Kimi K3 — 2.8T parameter open-source model, weighs July 27
articles.summary: Largest open-source model ever. Beats Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 on coding/agent benchmarks. Trails only Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol. $3/$15 per M tokens.

articles.title: Anthropic publishes alignment auditing agents — autonomous auditors deployed on Claude Opus 4
articles.summary: Three agents (Investigator, Evaluator, Breadth-First Red-Teamer) autonomously uncover hidden goals, build behavioral evaluations, surface concerning LLM behaviors.

articles.title: Microsoft Research Arbor — generalist autonomous research agent beats Codex and Claude Code
articles.summary: Persistent hypothesis-tree refinement for cumulative learning. 86% Any-Medal on MLE-Bench Lite. Outperforms Codex and Claude Code across six research tasks.

articles.title: Anthropic ships advanced tool use — Tool Search, Programmatic Calling, Use Examples
articles.summary: Dynamic tool discovery (Tool Search Tool), code-execution tool invocation (Programmatic Tool Calling), and universal demonstration standard (Tool Use Examples).

articles.title: White House releases AI Action Plan — Anthropic donates $20M to Public First Action
articles.summary: 'Winning the Race: America's AI Action Plan' focuses on infrastructure, federal adoption, safety testing. Anthropic supportive, donates $20M to advocacy.

articles.title: Qwen-VLA: unifying Vision-Language-Action across tasks, environments, and robot embodiments
articles.summary: Single VLA policy spanning diverse robot morphologies, environments, and manipulation tasks from Alibaba Qwen team.

articles.title: CHORUS: decentralized multi-robot collaboration with one VLA policy
articles.summary: Multiple robots with different embodiments collaborate using a single Vision-Language-Action policy. Decentralized coordination without central server.

articles.title: Robust-TO: confidence-aware tool orchestration beats Gemini-2.5-Pro on video understanding
articles.summary: Addresses the Blind Trust Problem in video reasoning. 56.4% avg accuracy — surpasses Gemini-2.5-Pro.

articles.title: audio.cpp Release 0.4 — Higgs Audio v3 TTS 4B and Fish Audio S2 Pro in C++/GGML
articles.summary: New high-quality TTS models in GGML. Higgs Audio v3 TTS 4B runs 10x real-time. Full GGUF loading, Q8 speed and VRAM gains.

articles.title: OpenEnv for Agentic RL — open-source community backing environment for agent reinforcement learning
articles.summary: Open-source environment for reinforcement learning with agents. Community rallying around standardised benchmarks for agentic RL.

articles.title: GPT-5.6 Sol becomes preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
articles.summary: OpenAI's flagship model now powers Microsoft 365 Copilot across enterprise deployments.

articles.title: Qwen3 MoE models gain 1M token context support — Qwen3-2507 update
articles.summary: Qwen3 235B-A22B and 30B-A3B updated with 1M token context. Extended context capabilities for hybrid-reasoning MoE models.

articles.title: Local LLM battle royale — model quants compared on swe-verified bench
articles.summary: Extensive data comparing local models and quantisation configs on a subset of SWE-bench verified. Community data-driven ranking.

articles.title: Startup founders urge US government not to cut off Chinese open-weight AI
articles.summary: 778 points on HN, 690 comments. Startup founders push back against potential US ban on Chinese open-weight AI models.

articles.title: Why Software Factories Fail — harness engineering alone is not enough
articles.summary: 216 points on HN. Argues that coding agent success requires more than prompt engineering — system design, context architecture and feedback loops matter.

articles.title: OpenAI acquires Ona — expands Codex with persistent cloud environments for long-running agents
articles.summary: Acquisition brings secure, persistent cloud environments enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
